summary: First full test run of W2G Platform MVP. All 19 features tested. Fixed one critical backend bug (MongoDB mixed projection in /api/applications). All backend tests now pass (11/11). All frontend flows verified via Playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: No upload button visible when applicant has no active application. Users who register but haven't submitted an apply form cannot upload documents.
Dashboard main area appears mostly empty for newly registered users (no application). 'Noch keine Bewerbung' state works but the page content area is very sparse.

issues: Footer banner shows '[OFFEN] Kontaktdaten und Adresse noch nicht abschließend verifiziert. Verwendung unter Vorbehalt.' - placeholder content needs replacing with real data

action_items: Replace footer placeholder '[OFFEN]' text with real address/contact data
Consider showing upload button on /portal/documents even when no application exists (or link to /apply)
Consider adding a confirmation field for password in register form
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Mixed MongoDB projection in list_applications endpoint (line 602): {'password_hash': 0, 'full_name': 1, ...} caused 500 error. Fixed to use inclusion-only projection.
CORS: allow_origins only includes FRONTEND_URL and localhost:3000 - if deployed on production domain, CORS may fail. Consider making this more flexible.
Token expiry: Access tokens expire in 60 min. No silent refresh mechanism on frontend detected - users will be logged out without notice.
Lead ingest: Creates user record without password - these users cannot log in. If a user submits the apply form and then tries to register with same email, they get 409 conflict.
server.py is 856 lines - approaching the 700-line threshold for splitting

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows working, minor UX issues noted)

seed_data_creation: Created test applicant and lead users during testing (test_applicant_*, test_lead_*, portal_test_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 MVP features tested and working. The critical bug was a MongoDB mixed projection error in GET /api/applications (fixed). Backend 100% passing. Key flows: Homepage/Lang switch OK, Apply form OK, Admin login -> /staff OK, Staff dashboard/Kanban/Admin panel OK, Applicant registration -> /portal OK, Portal journey/documents OK, Logout OK. Minor: Documents upload button not shown without an application.

rca_of_fixed_issue.root_cause: MongoDB does not allow mixing inclusion (1) and exclusion (0) in the same projection. In list_applications (server.py line ~602), the query used {'password_hash': 0, 'full_name': 1, 'email': 1, 'phone': 1, 'country': 1} which mixes both.
rca_of_fixed_issue.reproduction: Login as admin, call GET /api/applications - returned 500 error
